changelog: v3.2.1: Brand new Fortnite Sensitivity pages for Keyboard & Mouse and Controller, with verified-direct Thiefs KBM settings and a new KEYBINDS sub-section. Intel APO eligibility and install detection on the CPU > Optimize page. Polling rate guidance unified across Devices, Fortnite KBM and Controller pages - 1000 Hz safe default, 2000 Hz acceptable on top-tier CPUs, stay below 4000 Hz on Unreal Engine games. Dual-GPU laptop dashboard now prefers the discrete GPU and shows the integrated one. NIC power saving detection rewritten to fix Realtek and other drivers that silently no-op the Windows cmdlet. Fortnite Log Analysis and Crash Dump pages fleshed out. Navbar accordion fix, dark scrollbar track now clickable, winget UI hang fix, and Fortnite replay benchmarking flagged as currently broken.
